jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at CDAC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CDAC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About CDAC:
CDAC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC!
